basic_details.job_title: NABFINS Tele Caller Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NABARD Financial Services (NABFINS) has released an official notification for the recruitment of Tele Caller Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 20-06-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Tele Caller: Good Computer skills. Preferred languages - Hindi mandatory with South Indian Languages.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NABFINS Tele Caller Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NABFINS Tele Caller position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Tele Caller position at NABFINS is 20th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Tele Caller role?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification for the Tele Caller position is graduation. Additionally, good computer skills are essential.

faq.question: Q3. Which languages are preferred for the Tele Caller role?
faq.answer: Proficiency in Hindi is mandatory, along with knowledge of South Indian languages, is preferred for this role.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Tele Caller position at NABFINS?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply by sending their resume via email to [email protected] before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the location of the Head Office for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Head Office for this recruitment is located in Bengaluru, Karnataka.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for the Tele Caller position?
faq.answer: The Tele Caller position is a full-time job opportunity.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is Nabfins/OPS/1089.

faq.question: Q9. Does NABFINS provide salary details in the notification?
faq.answer: Salary details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data; it is advisable to refer to the official notification for specific salary information.

faq.question: Q10. What are the key responsibilities of a Tele Caller – CSO?
faq.answer: While specific responsibilities are not detailed, a Tele Caller – CSO typically involves customer service operations, potentially including making outbound calls, handling inquiries, and providing information.
